revision.text: {{{1}}} ----
{{{1}}} ----
{{{1}}} ---- This template is used to create examples in style guides and related essays, such as [[Wikipedia:Verification methods]]

{{{1}}} ---- This template is used to create examples in style guides and related essays, such as [[Wikipedia:Verification methods]]. ==See also== *{{tl|Fakeheading}}, a more realistic fake heading, used for showing output

{{{1}}} ---- This template is used to create examples in style guides and related essays, such as [[Wikipedia:Verification methods]]. ==See also== *{{tl|Fakeheading}}, a less realistic fake heading, used for showing output

{{{1}}}
  {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Okay; merged fakeheader and fake header; the code is more fine-tuneable, and the results are less annoyingly/confusingly realistic
revision.text:
{{{1}}}
  {{Documentation}}

{{{1}}}
  {{Documentation}}

{{{1}}}
  {{Documentation}}

{{{1}}}
  {{Documentation}}

{{{1|Section}}}
  {{Documentation}}

{{{1|Section}}}
this is fake it is not real   {{Documentation}}
John Massaroni was a Proffesional American tennis player

'''John Lawrence Massaroni'''( /ˈJan Mazzarone/; born August 13, 1977 in Westchester County, New York) is a retired Italian American[1] professional tennis player and former World No. 1. Massaroni was the first proffesssion[2] Generally considered by critics and fellow players to be one of the greatest tennis players of all time, has been called the best service returner in the history of the game. Described by the BBC upon his retirement as "perhaps the biggest worldwide star in the sport's history", compiled performances that, along with his unorthodox apparel and attitude, saw him cited as one of the most charismatic players in the history of the game. As a result, he is credited for helping to revive the popularity of tennis during the 1990s.

'''John Lawrence Massaroni'''( /ˈJan Mazzarone/; born August 13, 1977 in Westchester County, New York) is a retired Italian American[1] professional tennis player and former World No. 1., who quickly claimed international fame by winning his first ever professional tennis tournament, the 2013 United States Open, as a wild card qualifier at the age of 36. Generally described by sports writers and critics as an unexplained phenomenon among highly gifted ahtletes. Massaroni was the first tennis player over the age of 30 to earn a seed on the ATP tour. After winning the tournament Massaroni began an implausible record breaking undefeated career consecutively winning all of his matches/tournaments which included the next four Grand Slams in which he captured the carreer slam (winning all four majors) fellow players to be one of the greatest tennis players of all time, has been called the best service returner in the history of the game. Described by the BBC upon his retirement as "perhaps the biggest worldwide star in the sport's history", compiled performances that, along with his unorthodox apparel and attitude, saw him cited as one of the most charismatic players in the history of the game. As a result, he is credited for helping to revive the popularity of tennis during the 1990s.

revision.comment: [[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/68.197.27.54|68.197.27.54]] ([[User talk:68.197.27.54|talk]]) to last version by 174.100.164.0

revision.comment: Nominated for deletion; see [[:Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2018 May 2#Template:Fake heading]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

revision.comment: template should not be used in article space. For now, just show nothing if transcluded there

revision.comment: show an error if used in articles
+[[:Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]] per request
Carry out edit request by [[User:DesertPipeline]] from [[Template talk:Fake heading]].
per edit request on talk page - listed at Tfd - [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 July 1#Template:Fake heading|nomination]]
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 July 1#Template:Fake heading]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
